class.name: SPZLoader
class.brief_description: Loader for Niantic's SPZ compressed Gaussian Splatting format.
class.description: SPZLoader reads SPZ files, a compressed format that provides approximately 10x file size reduction compared to PLY with minimal visual degradation. SPZ is used by Scaniverse and other mobile-oriented Gaussian Splatting applications. The format uses a 16-byte header with magic number [code]0x5053474E[/code] ("NGSP"), followed by gzip-compressed packed splat attributes. Positions are 24-bit fixed-point, scales are 8-bit log-encoded, rotations use smallest-three quaternion encoding, and alphas are 8-bit sigmoid-encoded. Spherical harmonics coefficients are included when the header's SH degree is greater than zero. Both version 2 (3-byte rotations) and version 3 (4-byte rotations with improved precision) are supported. Files may be raw SPZ or fully gzip-wrapped.

method.name: load_file
method.description: Loads an SPZ file from the given filesystem path. Returns [constant OK] on success. After loading, retrieve the result with [method get_gaussian_data].

method.name: get_gaussian_data
method.description: Returns the [GaussianData] resource produced by the most recent [method load_file] call, or [code]null[/code] if no file has been loaded.

method.name: get_splat_count
method.description: Returns the number of Gaussian splats parsed from the loaded SPZ file.

method.name: get_load_statistics
method.description: Returns a dictionary of load statistics including format version, SH degree, splat count, and world-space bounds.
